name: The Robots Hope
short_description: Live the Adventures that await this very friendly robot who is faced with a harsh reality that he will have to face. 3D platform game in the purest mythical platform style with Futuristic touches.
detailed_description:
Experience the adventures that await this friendly robot who will have to face a harsh reality.

Features:

5 levels full of difficulty.

Item seller with which you can improve and customize your character.

Platform game in which you will have to use your wits and skills to be able to continue.

Powerful end-of-level enemies which, by defeating them, you can obtain incredible powers.

And a story of a futuristic world dominated by an evil creator.
